input.requirements: Build a local runnable stock sentiment analysis project for A-share market. 1. Daily opinion/news collection. 2. Sentiment classification (positive/neutral/negative). 3. Entity linking to stock codes and names. 4. Industry analysis. 5. Theme/topic analysis. 6. Risk tag extraction. 7. Daily report generation (json + markdown). - Subproject should run independently. - Subproject should be rebuildable from this requirement. - Main project orchestrates generation/execution/acceptance.
